economic_notes: Muscowpetung Saulteaux Business Developments Ltd. is a fully consolidated subsidiary. Muscowpetung Ki-Pih-Cheen and Mah-Jahn Convenience Store Inc. (The Skunk's Corner) is a government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Portfolio investments include 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP ($60,000) and 4.41% interest in Kief Cannabis Company Ltd. (fully impaired at $330,000). Multiple CIBC claim loans for surrender, Treaty 4 Benefits, Channelization, and Misadministration of Trust claims totalling over $6.5M, secured by assignment of settlement trust proceeds.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Prior year 2022 audit was qualified but the matter has been resolved. Nation carries significant net debt of $26.4M. Current portion of long-term debt is very large at $15.1M including demand loans. Multiple litigation claim loans from CIBC for land claims (Surrender, Treaty 4, Channelization, Misadministration of Trust) totalling ~$6.5M. Muscowpetung Saulteaux Business Developments Ltd. fully consolidated; The Skunk's Corner convenience store treated as GBE on modified equity basis with reserve for loss of $10,720. Accumulated deficit of $16.3M. Revenue lines for Retail sales and Saskatchewan Finance rebates show zero actuals (budget only items). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNT + FHQ + FHQ Dev + Yorkton TC + Living Sky + Government of Canada.
